defects.title: Identity mutation: reused content-hash id overwritten with different concept
defects.evidence: 5 high-severity incoherent facts; 5 mutated vertices drag prior edges to wrong endpoints
defects.rootCause: applyDeterministicIds skips re-hashing ids already in graph; mergeDelta is last-write-wins; a reused id with divergent content silently mutates
defects.proposedFix: only skip re-hashing for resolver-mapped ids; a reused id whose content hash differs takes its own hash

defects.title: Edge quality lags: low relationship support, citation, coherence
defects.rootCause: partly downstream of D-06-1 (mutated endpoints); partly extractor cites a span naming one endpoint, not the relationship
defects.proposedFix: require edge evidence to mention both endpoints or the relation verb; re-audit after D-06-1

defects.title: Property padding persists on enum/boolean fields
defects.rootCause: iteration-05 anti-padding prompt curbs description padding, not enum/boolean (neverCompromise, frequency, severity, returnLikelihood)
defects.proposedFix: gate rule: optional enum/boolean property requires its own supporting span, else dropped

defects.title: Conversation conduct residuals
defects.note: all 7 sections A-G covered; no whole section lost

defects.title: Stale deployment: live graph predates iteration-05/06 fixes
defects.evidence: demographic duplicate resolves correctly in repo code but not in the exported graph
